description: A massive gate constructed from three colossal cereal boxes towers before you. Beyond it, you can see the sprawling city of Breakfastopia: bakeries, town halls, restaurants, shops, and even shoe stores. The air is thick with the smell of butter and maple syrup.

cereal_box_wall.description: A massive wall made entirely out of brightly colored, sugary cereal boxes.

pancake_path.description: A fluffy, slightly sticky path made of interlocking pancakes.

item_potato.description: A potato is resting on a stack of buttered pancakes. It looks delicious.

exit_west.description: The path leads back to Shoeboxlandia.

exit_east.description: The path leads east toward a shimmering, static-filled horizon.

conditions.failMessage: You shouldn't venture further without the detective. He knows the way.

npc_tuxedo.description: A friendly pancake wearing a sharp tuxedo.

dialogue.text: "Welcome to Breakfastopia!" he exclaims, "home of the first meal of the day!"
Fred steps forward angrily. "We have come to extract the food you have STOLEN!"
The pancake looks confused. "What makes you believe that we have stolen your food?"
Freddista shoves Fred aside. "What my friend meant to say was, we are looking for some pasta and potatoes, that might have accidentally fallen into your hands. Have you received any lately?"
"No," says the pancake, "however, it happens we have the most skilled detective in Sentientworldia! Allow me to introduce him."
"The detective is right there, Fred! I have no more information for you. Enjoy your time in Breakfastopia!"

npc_willy.description: A waffle carrying a briefcase. He stands near a pedestal embroidered with pretzels.

dialogue.text: "My expiration date is expired," mutters the waffle as he approaches the pedestal.
Fred asks, "Do you have any idea who stole my lunch?" Willy sighs, "I am afraid your lunch is lost. However, there is a way of making some new pasta and potatoes."

Willy panted, "First, we head through the Electric Desert, past the Mountains of Misery, through the Hidden Hideout and the Glassy Castle. Then into the Great Noodle Factory for pasta, across the Scary Scrapyard, and through the Swamp of Rotten Apples... finally back to Shoeboxlandia."
Fred whines, "That will take so long!" Freddista mutters, "It's not that long." Willy adjusts his glasses: "Well, we better stop complaining, and head to the desert."
"Remember, be careful with the electric sand," cautioned Willy, "It will zap you in an instant."
"We have talked enough, Fred. The desert awaits, and my briefcase isn't going to carry itself. Let's move out!"
